leadText: The Fluffy Tail (Japanese: エネコのシッポ Eneco's Tail) is an item introduced in Generation III. It can be used to escape from a battle with a wild Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during a battle with a wild Pokémon , it allows the player to escape instantly regardless of any factors that would otherwise prevent escape. In Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness , it cannot be used to escape from wild Pokémon at Poké Spots .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Use to flee from any battle with a wild Pok é mon . Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. FR LG An attractive item. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A toy that attracts the attention of a Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon. S V A toy that attracts the attention of Pokémon. It guarantees escape from any battle with wild Pokémon.
